title: Cobblemon Text Fix
description: This resource pack fixes a vast majority of text errors in Cobblemon.
body:
**This resource pack fixes a vast majority of text errors in Cobblemon.**
This includes fixing the names and descriptions of moves such as Alluring Voice and Ivy Cudgel, and fixing the item messages when certain items are used such as Focus Sashes and berries that weaken super-effective moves. 

If you find any other text errors that aren't listed below, I recommend joining the official Cobblemon Discord Server, going to the `#🎁|addon-content` channel and finding the post for this resource pack. There you can send messages and report any more text errors.

(Please note: these are all currently only in English, I do plan on adding Spanish translations in the future once I finish up my Spanish classes and know how to translate them accurately.)

Here is the full list of text errors that are fixed:
- cobblemon.move.alluringvoice
- cobblemon.move.alluringvoice.desc
- cobblemon.move.temperflare
- cobblemon.move.temperflare.desc
- cobblemon.move.supercellslam
